body_txt: If Slut-Shaming is happening, she’ll (or, less commonly, he’ll) be at the scene of the crime. If you didn’t want to get a nasty stare for wearing a skimpy outfit, talking in a vulgar way, or having lots of sex, she thinks that maybe you should have thought about that before being a whore. Often Christian, or at least religious , and claims superiority over others based on their perceived promiscuity compared to her purity. She’s more than happy to spread nasty rumors, true or not, to defame those whores — what?! She has to keep the community safe, after all! And she’ll be sure to pray for their poor souls. It’s possible she’s wary about the slut in question stealing her husband, or that they’re pursuing the same guy: as the good girl, she’ll feel Entitled To Have Him . She may be celibate herself, or trapped in a loveless marriage, and overly prudish as a kind of Sour Grapes : " I deny myself my sexuality , so why don't these people do the same thing? ". Alternatively, she may behave this way but be revealed to have a lot of sex herself, making her a Hypocrite . More sympathetic examples of the trope may play up that she lives in a society where women are economically dependent on men, making her come across as justified — or at least as a Troubled Sympathetic Bigot who is only trying to survive in No Woman's Land . Perhaps she's in an abusively 'traditional' relationship, with a husband who doesn't care if she doesn't want sex . A single, non-religious example might be a Straw Feminist who believes that the targets of her scorn are making other women (or men) look bad, and that they are the reason their whole sex does not get proper respect. Note that a character who chose to be chaste — without being a Jerkass about it — is not this trope. Sister Trope to Smug Straight Edge , who is similarly condescending to people who indulge in drugs, alcohol, or other such vices. Compare Armoured Closet Gay , Female Misogynist , Heteronormative Crusader , Holier than Thou , Internalized Categorism , Lie Back and Think of England , Madonna-Whore Complex , Moral Guardians , My Girl Is Not a Slut , Not Like Other Girls , Sex Is Evil, and I Am Horny , and Slut-Shaming . Contrast Ethical Slut , For Happiness , and Safe, Sane, and Consensual .
